world.title: Political and Regulatory Affairs Round-Up: Issue No. 12 of 2026
world.description: Kenya Governors Revive Senate Extortion Claims in Kenya Kenya’s Council of Governors (CoG) has renewed allegations that some Senate committees are engaging in extortion and harassment when summoning county governors for oversight hearings. world.title: Saudi-Arabia, UAE, Six Other Countries Slam Israel Over 'Apartheid' Death Penalty Law For Palestinians
world.description: Saudi-Arabia, UAE, Six Other Countries Slam Israel Over 'Apartheid' Death Penalty Law For Palestinians

world.title: Lawyers move to block US deportations to Uganda amid reports flight en route
world.description: The Uganda Law Society (ULS), alongside the East Africa Law Society, has gone to court to block a controversial deportation arrangement with the United States, amid reports that dozens of individuals are already en route to Entebbe.

world.title: ‘You have to be serious’: Macron criticises Trump’s mixed messages about Nato and Iran
world.description: Speaking in South Korea, the French president defended the transatlantic alliance and called for return to peace

world.title: Donald Trump fires US attorney general Pam Bondi, White House says
world.description: President grew frustrated with Bondi over handling of Epstein files scandal and pace of prosecution of administration’s adversaries

world.title: IDPs return to Akobo, but hunger, disease threaten fragile recovery
world.description: A growing number of internally displaced persons (IDPs) are gradually returning to their homes in Akobo County of Jonglei State, but worsening humanitarian conditions are undermining the gradual recovery after months of displacement, a latest report presented to the authorities reveals.

world.title: Backshall says orca sighting off Cornwall 'greatest British wildlife encounter'
world.description: Presenter Steve Backshall says seeing John Coe and Aquarius was one of his best wildlife encounters.

business.title: Zenith Bank Ghana posts strong profit growth as earnings approach GH₵1bn in 2025
business.description: Zenith Bank Ghana Limited delivered a robust financial performance in 2025, with profit after tax rising sharply to GH₵997.7 million, nearly doubling from GH₵452.0 million recorded in 2024.

business.title: Air India health and weight policy could possibly put cabin crew on unpaid leave
business.description: Air India is set to enforce new weight and health standards for cabin crew starting May 1, with staff falling outside certain BMI ranges facing unpaid leave, according to reports.

business.title: Gold slides over 2% as Trump extends Iran operation, lifts USD bids
business.description: Gold price recoils by some 2% as the US Dollar rises after US President Donald Trump revealed that the war on Iran would last from two to three weeks, pouring cold water on hopes for a quick resolution to the Middle East conflict.

business.title: OC Transpo testing plastic seats for potential wider use on its buses
business.description: OC Transpo is testing out plastic seats on one of its buses and asking riders what they think.

business.title: Kalshi Now Places the Odds of a Recession in 2026 at 28%. 2 ETFs to Buy to Hedge Your Downside.
business.description: The likelihood of a recession has increased significantly since February, according to the predictions market platform Kalshi.

business.title: Starbucks' Unicorn Frappuccino comes to Coachella for a few hours
business.description: The mythical, long-gone Unicorn Frappuccino will only be available for a few hours during both weekends of Coachella.

business.title: Northern Adventure ferry involved in 'near miss' incident: BC Ferries
business.description: The Northern Adventure ferry was involved in a "near miss" incident last month, according to BC Ferries.

business.title: Qiagen (QGEN) Upgraded to Buy by Deutsche Bank After 30% Decline
business.description: Qiagen N.V. (NYSE:QGEN) ranks among the oversold European stocks to buy. On March 13, Deutsche Bank upgraded Qiagen N.V. (NYSE:QGEN) to Buy from Hold, maintaining a $54 price target on the company’s shares. science.title: Deep mantle deformation is linked to subducted slabs, global map shows
science.description: Slow roiling convection currents deep within Earth's mantle, which are associated with the movements of tectonic plates, also deform the material of the mantle itself. Now, a new study in The Seismic Record confirms that much of this deformation in the lowest level of the mantle occurs where researchers think there may be deeply subducted tectonic slabs.

science.title: In the running: On the Artemis II launch
science.description: The Artemis II launch reassures U.S. partners that NASA remains on track

science.title: Providing the Artemis mission with solar radiation forecasts
science.description: In the Artemis II mission, NASA will test out a pair of new solar radiation forecasts, developed at University of Michigan Engineering, designed to protect astronauts venturing away from Earth. The mission launched Wednesday.

science.title: Play Sensor Listens to the Developing Brain
science.description: What is the CAMEO organoid sensor? Researchers have created a low-cost, carbon nanotube-based microelectrode array to monitor brain organoid electrical activity.

science.title: Two bright comets grace Australian skies in April. Here's how to see them
science.description: Two comets are currently hurtling towards the Sun. If they survive the trip, they may put on a dazzling show for Australian stargazers this month.

science.title: Sex at arm’s length? Male octopuses use specialised arm to mate, scientists find
science.description: Sensory organ in male cephalopod able to detect female hormone progesterone, even if male cannot see partner

science.title: The Octopus Penis Arm Doesn't Just Deliver Sperm-It Sniffs Out the Sweet Spot
science.description: The hectocotylus is both a reproductive and sensory organ, Harvard scientists and others have found.

ai.title: OpenAI buys tech talk show in push to shape AI narrative

ai.description: OpenAI, jostling with Anthropic for enterprise customers, has bought TBPN, an online tech talk show that has built a ​loyal Silicon Valley following through interviews with industry CEOs.
